items.title: Phase 8.4 Worker Push And PR Creation
items.acceptance: Use the plan acceptance criteria as source of truth: docs/project-harness/tasks/phase-8.4-worker-push-pr-creation/plan.md. MVP must let a coding host's `coordinate pr publish` verify remote ref SHA via `gh api`, idempotently create-or-link a GitHub PR (with head_owner forced equal to repo owner), and forward the PublishResult JSON to `coordinate pr publish-record --result-json` so the remote DB's tasks row gets the PR URL upserted. The remote sink is record-only and never invokes `gh`. CLI must exit non-zero on push_required/publish.blocked so CI / harnessctl can fail-fast. Existing CI/review/merge gate untouched.

items.title: Phase 8.7 Worker Self-Test Before Closeout (根因)
items.acceptance: worker closeout 前 deploy + 自举 + self_test_evidence. 解决 omp 反复没自举就 closeout 藏 bug. Worker: omp.
items.verification: #7 work (operator self-test: pending+bootstrap+evidence field). soft reminder insufficient → hard gate next task.

review.summary: ROUND-1 APPROVE with notes. Motivation is real and well-evidenced (phase-8.5/8.6 藏 bug 是 operator 实测才发现的). Root cause analysis correct: 单测覆盖不了 daemon/bridge 长进程集成 bug. Design pragmatic: 半自动 + 证据 (不硬 gate) 适合 first version (硬 gate 留后续). WS-A/B/C 范围合理 (bootstrap 协议 + packet schema + reviewer 检查). Open questions answered: (a) e2e scope = 本 task 的新链路 (per plan); (b) e2e fail → worker 修 → re-self-test → evidence 更新, 不能修就 escalate operator; (c) 首版对所有 task 应用, plan-only/refactor 由 reviewer 在 bootstrap 显式标记 skip; (d) evidence 真实性 = reviewer spot-check (e.g., ssh kook-hermes-admin cat /opt/multinexus/VERSION_DEPLOYED) + 必填 raw e2e 输出 (非 summary). Recommended edits (must-fix before closeout, not blocking implementation): edit-1 Workstream B 加 'Self-Test Failure Handling' 子节 (worker 修+re-evidence 或 escalate, 不 auto-approve with failing e2e); edit-2 self_test_evidence schema 加 raw_e2e_output 字段 (必填, 非 summary) 让 reviewer spot-check; edit-3 在 WS-A bootstrap 加 'applies_to=code_change_tasks' 标记 (plan-only/refactor 显式 skip, reviewer 看到 skip 原因). Plan ready for implementation. Dogfood (this task self-tests) noted — watch for circular dependency.

items.title: Phase 8.8 Daemon decision= Runtime Path (可见性核心)
items.acceptance: runtime job [agent-report] decision= → review.completed 自动 + Discord 可见 + operator 收到 (不挖 job list). 解 report_job_result response_text decision=. Worker: omp/opencode.
items.verification: phase-8.8 daemon decision= runtime. operator impl + self-test. 89 tests OK.

review.summary: ROUND-1 APPROVE with answers to 3 open questions + minor edits. Motivation is real and well-evidenced (phase-8.5/8.6/8.7 都实测过 review 意见埋 job result + Discord 看不到 + operator 手动挖 job list — 这是用户最初诉求的最终一块). Root cause: daemon _parse_agent_report 只解 Discord 消息, runtime report_job_result 没接同一解析. Q1 (helper 位置) = SHARED MODULE (抽 coordinate/parsing/agent_report.py 或类似, daemon + runtime 复用, 单一 source of truth). Q2 (trigger 层) = DAEMON PUMP (report_job_result 只 emit raw agent.reported with decision in payload; daemon pump 这条 event, 当 decision=approve/reject 时 emit review.completed/review.rejected — 解耦, 符合现有 daemon 路由架构, 避免 runtime 直接做 lifecycle mutation). Q3 (renderer) = EXTEND agent.reported policy renderer 加 decision 字段 (source=runtime 时显示), review.completed 保留自己 renderer (两 event 两 delivery 都渲染, 一致). WS-A/B/C 范围合理, 与 phase-8.6 awaiting_operator 协调明确 (review decision 走 review.completed, worker done 走 awaiting_operator). 推荐 edits (worker 实现前 absorb): edit-1 WS-A 加 'multiple [agent-report] blocks' 处理 (取最后一个含 decision 的; latest intent wins); edit-2 WS-A 加 strict enum validation (decision ∈ {approve, reject, blocked}; unknown → log warning + fallback no-decision, treat as action=done awaiting_operator); edit-3 worker bootstrap 加 reminder 提示 worker 仍用 [agent-report] decision= 格式 (runtime 解析依赖); edit-4 daemon pump 测试覆盖 concurrency (multiple agent.reported for same task 应 idempotent, source-specific key per phase-8.6). Non-goals 合理 (不动 Discord 路径 / reviewer handoff / awaiting_operator). dogfood (本 task 用 reviewer handoff 验证 Discord 可见 review 意见) 设计扎实.
